author: PlayStation YouTube
summary: PlayStationの「State of Play」が6月2日（米国時間）に配信決定。60分超のアップデートや発表、ゲームプレイ映像を公開。マーベル作品「Marvel's Wolverine」の詳細も初公開され、PS5向けに9月15日発売予定。
raw_text:
State of Play | June 2, 2026 [English Subtitles]
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15

author: PlayStation YouTube
summary: PlayStationは、内蔵充電池、超低遅延応答、スリングキャリーケースを備えたFlexStrike™ワイヤレスファイトスティックを発表しました。PC対応は発売後に順次展開予定です。
raw_text:
FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick - Design Story
https://www.playstation.com/accessories/flexstrike-wireless-fight-stick/

Join the fray at home or away with the FlexStrike™ wireless fight stick, featuring a built-in rechargeable battery, ultra-low latency response, and a sling carry case.

PC compatibility for FlexStrike wireless fight stick will roll out following launch, with availability expanding to more users over time.

#ps5 #playstation

Tomo: Endless Blue - Official Alpha Gameplay Trailer (ft. Cécile Corbel)
Tomo: Endless Blue, a Monster-Taming ARPG set in a Voxel Open World. Set sail through the Endless Blue, an ocean realm home to mysterious creatures called Tomo. Team up to fight, build homes with friends, or craft wild vehicles to explore procedurally generated islands, villages and tales.

author: 電ファミニコゲーマー RSS
summary: 『映画ちいかわ 人魚の島のひみつ』の予告映像が公開。OPテーマはナガノ氏作詞、ハチワレ(CV:田中誠人)が歌う「くつずれ」で、島を舞台にした物語の一端が描かれている。

author: AUTOMATON RSS
summary: 人気協力アクションゲーム『PICO PARK:Classic Edition』は、近いうちに配信停止となることが決定しました。現在、永久無料化されており、配信停止前に無料で入手可能です。

raw_text:

TECOPARKは6月1日、『PICO PARK:Classic Edition』の配信停止決定を告知した。

author: Crunchyroll YouTube
summary: アニメ『ウィッチクラフトワークス』のエピソード10「初めて見る！」がCrunchyrollで配信開始。ココが魔女見習いとして成長していく物語。
raw_text:
A Spell That Lets The Color Blind See | Witch Hat Atelier
Episode 10: Seeing for the very first time! Watch Witch Hat Atelier on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-wha

ABOUT WITCH HAT ATELIER
In a world where only witches can cast magic, they must avoid being seen by ordinary people while casting. While Coco does her chores, she daydreams of becoming a witch. When a young witch named Qifrey visits her village, Coco uncovers the “absolute secret,” becomes Qifrey’s apprentice, and begins her studies.
related_anime_title: ウィッチクラフトワークス
